scripts.playground:hono:build: npm run build -w hono-api && npm run build -w hono-client
scripts.playground:build: npm run playground:start:build && npm run playground:hono:build
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run pack:dry
scripts.version:alpha: npm run release:check && npm version prerelease --preid alpha -w @codeva-dev/typed-result
scripts.publish:alpha: npm run release:check && npm publish -w @codeva-dev/typed-result --tag alpha --access public
